compiled_state.title: Decide + remove or adopt: e2e_validation_probe.sh / e2e_field_validation_probe.sh (live-Jira probes)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
~3,200 LOC of live-Jira probe shell shipped in the wheel. Evidence: zero inbound references — not in docs/releasing.md (documented release probe is scripts/probe-rebar.sh), not CI, no tests. Contain dso_label vars (e2e_field_validation_probe.sh:1319-1348) and 'DSO ... probe' Jira summaries. RECOMMEND delete (they are unowned); alternative: adopt as operator tooling — move under scripts/ or tests/, sweep DSO strings, wire into docs/releasing.md. Either way they must leave the published package (pyproject ships all of _engine/**).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Decision recorded (delete vs adopt) in the ticket
- [ ] Files removed from src/rebar/_engine/ (deleted, or relocated + de-dso'd + documented)
- [ ] Wheel no longer ships them; full suite green

comments.body: DECISION RECORDED (2026-06-09, audit owner direction): DEFAULT TO DELETE both e2e probe scripts (they are unowned, unreferenced, and ship dead weight in the wheel). EXCEPTION: if the team wants to keep a live-Jira field-validation probe for release QA, the adopt path requires (a) move out of src/rebar/_engine/ (e.g. scripts/), (b) sweep DSO strings + dso_label vars, (c) wire into docs/releasing.md — all three or none. Executor: do the delete unless an adopt sign-off comment exists on this ticket.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: DECISION (per maintainer): ADOPT as reference tooling, not delete. These live-Jira e2e probes were used to harden/validate Jira sync and are useful for pressure-testing future Jira changes. Relocated src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/{e2e_validation_probe,e2e_field_validation_probe}.sh -> scripts/jira-pressure-test/ (outside the wheel's packages=[src/rebar] and outside pytest testpaths, so never shipped and never run by the suite). Relabeled headers as REFERENCE/MANUAL pressure-test tooling, removed stale reconcile-bridge.yml (deleted workflow) usage lines, repointed engine/CLI path derivation at $REPO_ROOT/src/rebar/_engine so they stay runnable, and added scripts/jira-pressure-test/README.md.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
